case_title: MARIANNA FRAME ET AL VS. PRECISE PACKING, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-13-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIANNA FRAME IS PRESENT (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). PLAINTIFF JAMES FRAME IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRECISE PACKING IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS ADVISED TO SUBMIT A PROPER ZOOM REQUEST IF WILL APPEAR BY ZOOM AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
